arts.ttl: Kane excited about new England chapter under Tuchel

arts.ttl: England need hunger to win not fear to lose - Tuchel
arts.sum: England manager Thomas Tuchel says he wants the team to play with a "hunger to win" and not "a fear to lose" as he prepares for his first match in charge of the Three Lions on Friday.

arts.ttl: Premier League intensity or caution - how will Tuchel's England play?
arts.sum: Before Thomas Tuchel's first game as England boss, BBC Sport tries to unpick - and predict - how his Three Lions side might play.

arts.sum: England take on Albania this Friday in 2026 World Cup qualifying, with Thomas Tuchel overseeing his first match. Preview includes team news, how to watch and more.

arts.ttl: Tuchel must bear the oppressive weight of England’s history
arts.sum: The new head coach was bullish about his side’s prospects for World Cup qualification, which begins against Albania So, Thomas Tuchel, was the ball over the line? And, yes, we are still talking about it. “I don’t think so,” the new England head coach replied. “But there was no VAR so it stands.” Ah, Thomas. You’re on our side now. And if you want to earn the right to sing the national anthem, you are going to have to do better than this. More seriously, though, as Tuchel throws himself into the challenge of managing England and moving on from the inconvenience of his German passport, this was an instructive exchange.
